com.irurueta.units

Class SpeedFormatter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.units.MeasureFormatter<Speed,SpeedUnit>
      • com.irurueta.units.SpeedFormatter
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Cloneable

    public class SpeedFormatter
extends MeasureFormatter<Speed,SpeedUnit>
implements Cloneable
    Formats and parses speed value and unit.

      Kilometers per hour symbol.

      Kilometers per second symbol.

      static String MILES_PER_HOUR

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods

      Clones this speed formatter.

      Determines if two speed formatters are equal by comparing all of their internal parameters.

      Attempts to determine a speed unit within a measurement string representation.

      Formats and converts provided speed value and unit using provided unit system.

      Returns unit string representation.

      Gets unit system for detected unit into provided string representation of a measurement.

      • clone

        public Object clone()
        Clones this speed formatter.
        Specified by:
        clone in class MeasureFormatter<Speed,SpeedUnit>
        Returns:
        a copy of this speed formatter.

      • equals

        public boolean equals(Object obj)
        Determines if two speed formatters are equal by comparing all of their internal parameters.
        Overrides:
        equals in class MeasureFormatter<Speed,SpeedUnit>
        Parameters:
        obj - another object to compare.
        Returns:
        true if provided object is assumed to be equal to this instance.

      • getUnitSystem

        public UnitSystem getUnitSystem(String source)
        Gets unit system for detected unit into provided string representation of a measurement.
        Specified by:
        getUnitSystem in class MeasureFormatter<Speed,SpeedUnit>
        Parameters:
        source - a measurement string representation to be checked.
        Returns:
        a unit system (either metric or imperial) or null if unit cannot be determined.

      • parse

        public Speed parse(String source)
            throws ParseException,
                   UnknownUnitException
        Parses provided string and tries to determine speed value and unit.
        Specified by:
        parse in class MeasureFormatter<Speed,SpeedUnit>
        Parameters:
        source - a string to be parsed.
        Returns:
        a speed containing a value and unit.
        Throws:
        ParseException - if provided string cannot be parsed.
        UnknownUnitException - if unit cannot be determined.

      • findUnit

        public SpeedUnit findUnit(String source)
        Attempts to determine a speed unit within a measurement string representation.
        Specified by:
        findUnit in class MeasureFormatter<Speed,SpeedUnit>
        Parameters:
        source - a measurement string representation.
        Returns:
        a speed unit, or null if none can be determined.

      • formatAndConvert

        public String formatAndConvert(Number value,
                               SpeedUnit unit,
                               UnitSystem system)
        Formats and converts provided speed value and unit using provided unit system. If provided value is too large for provided unit, this method will convert it to a more appropriate unit using provided unit system (either metric or imperial).
        Specified by:
        formatAndConvert in class MeasureFormatter<Speed,SpeedUnit>
        Parameters:
        value - a speed value.
        unit - a speed unit.
        system - system unit to convert speed to.
        Returns:
        a string representation of speed value and unit.

      • formatAndConvertMetric

        public String formatAndConvertMetric(Number value,
                                     SpeedUnit unit)
        Formats and converts provided speed value and unit using metric unit system. If provided speed value is too large for provided speed unit, this method will convert it to a more appropriate unit.
        Parameters:
        value - a speed value.
        unit - a speed unit.
        Returns:
        a string representation of speed value and unit using metric unit system.

      • formatAndConvertImperial

        public String formatAndConvertImperial(Number value,
                                       SpeedUnit unit)
        Formats and converts provided speed value and unit using imperial unit system. If provided speed value is too large for provided speed unit, this method will convert it to a more appropriate unit.
        Parameters:
        value - a speed value.
        unit - a speed unit.
        Returns:
        a string representation of speed value and unit using imperial unit system.

      • getUnitSymbol

        public String getUnitSymbol(SpeedUnit unit)
        Returns unit string representation.
        Specified by:
        getUnitSymbol in class MeasureFormatter<Speed,SpeedUnit>
        Parameters:
        unit - a speed unit.
        Returns:
        its string representation.
